chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D- 985 of 2025 [Waseem Ahmed Jamali & others v. Province of Sindh and others] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.6424/25 3.For hg of main case 28.03.2025. M/s. Faizullah Malano and Abdul Rashid Rajar, advocates for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, Assistant Advocate General. Moulvi Iqbal Haider, advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No. 2 to 5. Respondent No. 4 Engineer Sadam Ali Khichi, Director Student Affairs and Security is present submits that if the petitioners/students execute a fresh bond that in future they will not indulge in any political activity, or create any law and order situation in the University, or participate in any political demonstration or raise any political slogan against the University, they would remove the penalty against the petitioners/students and would allow them registration in examination. Learned counsel for petitioners undertake to execute such bond today till 05:00 p.m. as from tomorrow Eid holidays will commence. Subject to execution of such bond by the petitioners/students, the University/Chairman Syndicate is directed to open the portal for the petitioners/students for registration in the exams starting from 7th April, 2025 and would further allow them to attend their classes in future. The petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending applications. JUDGE HANIF JUDGE
